languages.text: {n}Мехадендрит Эоганна перехватывает щупальце Паскаля.{/n} "Остановись, магос. Благословение Омниссии не касалось сих плит, и тех, кому они предназначены. Те, что ты кличешь нефилимехами, есмь ксеносы, коварнее и страшнее которых не видал человек". {n}Тем не менее, сам он не отрывает взгляд от находки.{/n}

{n}Eogunn's mechadendrite seizes Pasqal's own tentacle-like limb.{/n} "Stop, Magos. The blessing of the Omnissiah has touched neither these slabs nor those intended to use them. The ones you call Nephilimechs are xenos, more insidious and dreadful than Humankind has ever known." {n}Despite his words, he does not look away from the finds.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Мехадендрит Эоганна перехватывает щупальце Паскаля.{/n} "Остановись, магос. Благословение Омниссии не касалось сих плит, и тех, кому они предназначены. Те, что ты кличешь нефилимехами, есмь ксеносы, коварнее и страшнее которых не видал человек". {n}Тем не менее, сам он не отрывает взгляд от находки.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn's mechadendrite catches Pasqal's tendril.{/n} "Stop, Magos. The blessing of the Omnissiah has not touched neither these slabs, nor those they are destined for. Those you call Nephilimechs are xenos, more insidious and dreadful than Humankind has ever known." {n}Still, he keeps his eyes fixed on the findings.{/n}

{n}Eogunn's mechadendrite catches Pasqal's tendril.{/n} "Stop, Magos. The blessing of the Omnissiah has not touched neither these slabs, nor those they are destined for. Those you call Nephilimechs are xenos, more insidious and dreadful than Humankind has ever known." {n}Still, he keeps his eyes fixed on the findings.{/n}

{n}Eogunn's mechadendrite seizes Pasqal's own tentacle-like limb.{/n} "Stop, Magos. The blessing of the Omnissiah has touched neither these slabs nor those intended to use them. The ones you call Nephilimechs are xenos, more insidious and dreadful than Humankind has ever known." {n}Despite his words, he does not look away from the finds.{/n}

{n}Eogunn's mechadendrite seizes Pasqal's own tentacle-like limb.{/n} "Stop, Magos. The blessing of the Omnissiah has touched neither these slabs nor those intended to use them. The ones you call Nephilimechs are xenos, more insidious and dreadful than Humankind has ever known." {n}Despite his words, he does not look away from the finds.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La mecadendrita de Eogunn se aferra a la tentacular homóloga que blande Pasqal.{/n} «Deténgase, magos. La bendición del Omnissiah nunca ha tocado ni estas losas ni a quienes se supone que deben usarlas. Las criaturas que denomina nefilimecas son xenos, más taimados y espantosos que cualquier otro al que haya encontrado la Humanidad». {n}Pese a sus palabras, no aparta la vista del hallazgo.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's mechadendrite seizes Pasqal's own tentacle-like limb.{/n} "Stop, Magos. The blessing of the Omnissiah has touched neither these slabs nor those intended to use them. The ones you call Nephilimechs are xenos, more insidious and dreadful than Humankind has ever known." {n}Despite his words, he does not look away from the finds.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La mecadendrita de Eogunn se aferra a la tentacular homóloga que blande Pasqal.{/n} «Deténgase, magos. La bendición del Omnissiah nunca ha tocado ni estas losas ni a quienes se supone que deben usarlas. Las criaturas que denomina nefilimecas son xenos, más taimados y espantosos que cualquier otro al que haya encontrado la Humanidad». {n}Pese a sus palabras, no aparta la vista del hallazgo.{/n}

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡的机械触须猛地抓住帕斯卡那触手般的肢体。{/n}“住手，贤者。无论是这些石板，还是试图使用它们的人，都未曾得到欧姆尼赛亚的祝福。你口中的涅菲利姆就是异形，其阴险可怖远超人类的想象。”{n}尽管嘴上这么说，他的目光却始终没有离开那些发现物。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's mechadendrite seizes Pasqal's own tentacle-like limb.{/n} "Stop, Magos. The blessing of the Omnissiah has touched neither these slabs nor those intended to use them. The ones you call Nephilimechs are xenos, more insidious and dreadful than Humankind has ever known." {n}Despite his words, he does not look away from the finds.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡的机械触须猛地抓住帕斯卡那触手般的肢体。{/n}“住手，贤者。无论是这些石板，还是试图使用它们的人，都未曾得到欧姆尼赛亚的祝福。你口中的涅菲利姆就是异形，其阴险可怖远超人类的想象。”{n}尽管嘴上这么说，他的目光却始终没有离开那些发现物。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunns Mechadendrit packt Pasqals tentakelgleiche Gliedmaße.{/n} "Halt, Magos. Der Segen des Omnissiah hat weder diese Plattformen gesegnet, noch jene, für die sie bestimmt sind. Die Wesen, die Ihr Nephilimechs nennt, sind Xenos, die teuflischer und schrecklicher sind, als alles, was die Menschheit je gesehen hat." {n}Trotz seiner Worte wendet er seinen Blick nicht von den Funden ab.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's mechadendrite seizes Pasqal's own tentacle-like limb.{/n} "Stop, Magos. The blessing of the Omnissiah has touched neither these slabs nor those intended to use them. The ones you call Nephilimechs are xenos, more insidious and dreadful than Humankind has ever known." {n}Despite his words, he does not look away from the finds.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunns Mechadendrit packt Pasqals tentakelgleiche Gliedmaße.{/n} "Halt, Magos. Der Segen des Omnissiah hat weder diese Plattformen gesegnet, noch jene, für die sie bestimmt sind. Die Wesen, die Ihr Nephilimechs nennt, sind Xenos, die teuflischer und schrecklicher sind, als alles, was die Menschheit je gesehen hat." {n}Trotz seiner Worte wendet er seinen Blick nicht von den Funden ab.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La mécadendrite d'Eogunn se saisit du bras tentaculaire de Pasqal.{/n} « Pas si vite, magos. La bénédiction de l'Omnimessie n'a pas touché ces dalles, pas plus que leurs destinataires. Ceux que vous appelez néphilimechs sont des xénos, plus insidieux et redoutables que toutes les créatures que l'humanité a jamais connues. » {n}Malgré ses propos dissuasifs, son regard reste rivé en permanence sur votre découverte.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's mechadendrite seizes Pasqal's own tentacle-like limb.{/n} "Stop, Magos. The blessing of the Omnissiah has touched neither these slabs nor those intended to use them. The ones you call Nephilimechs are xenos, more insidious and dreadful than Humankind has ever known." {n}Despite his words, he does not look away from the finds.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La mécadendrite d'Eogunn se saisit du bras tentaculaire de Pasqal.{/n} « Pas si vite, magos. La bénédiction de l'Omnimessie n'a pas touché ces dalles, pas plus que leurs destinataires. Ceux que vous appelez néphilimechs sont des xénos, plus insidieux et redoutables que toutes les créatures que l'humanité a jamais connues. » {n}Malgré ses propos dissuasifs, son regard reste rivé en permanence sur votre découverte.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunn'un mekadentriti, Pasqal'ın dokunaç benzeri uzvunu yakalıyor.{/n} "Durun Magos. Hermesih'in kutsaması ne bu tabletlere ne de onları kullanması amaçlananlara dokunmuştur. Nefilimek olarak adlandırdıklarınız, İnsanlığın bugüne kadar tanıdığı en sinsi ve korkunç zenolardır." {n}Sözlerine rağmen buluntulardan gözünü ayırmıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's mechadendrite seizes Pasqal's own tentacle-like limb.{/n} "Stop, Magos. The blessing of the Omnissiah has touched neither these slabs nor those intended to use them. The ones you call Nephilimechs are xenos, more insidious and dreadful than Humankind has ever known." {n}Despite his words, he does not look away from the finds.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn'un mekadentriti, Pasqal'ın dokunaç benzeri uzvunu yakalıyor.{/n} "Durun Magos. Hermesih'in kutsaması ne bu tabletlere ne de onları kullanması amaçlananlara dokunmuştur. Nefilimek olarak adlandırdıklarınız, İnsanlığın bugüne kadar tanıdığı en sinsi ve korkunç zenolardır." {n}Sözlerine rağmen buluntulardan gözünü ayırmıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}エゴンの機械枝がパスカルの腕のような肢を掴む。{/n}「止まれ、マゴス。オムニシアの祝福はこれらの石板にも、それらを操るために作られたものにも触れていない。お前がネフィリム機械と呼ぶものは異種族だ。人類が今まで知ったことのない、より狡猾で恐ろしい存在だ。」{n}彼の言葉にもかかわらず、彼は発見した石板から目を離さない。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's mechadendrite seizes Pasqal's own tentacle-like limb.{/n} "Stop, Magos. The blessing of the Omnissiah has touched neither these slabs nor those intended to use them. The ones you call Nephilimechs are xenos, more insidious and dreadful than Humankind has ever known." {n}Despite his words, he does not look away from the finds.{/n}
